items.text: So, you're here to find a specific mirror?

I'm merely looking for a good one,
in pristine condition.

These early mirrors are scathed, so I'll
do a few more rounds of the trial,

get further in,
where doubtless they are fresher.
And then you'll take that mirror?

Take? I'll leave payment in silver
that is more than fair.
Display it in your flagship emporium?

'Display' sounds so passive.
I'll be frequently on hand
to demonstrate, proudly.
